ai_suggestion: To navigate today's wide temperature swing in style, layer a breathable cotton tee under a sleek denim jacket or a lightweight utility jacket paired with tailored chinos. Opt for natural, breathable fabrics that allow you to easily adapt as the temperature warms up from a cool morning to a very pleasant afternoon. Be sure to bring along a chic pair of sunglasses to shield your eyes during those bright, partly cloudy intervals, plus a spacious tote bag to stow your jacket later. It is a beautiful day for your outdoor tasks, just be sure to start bundled up and shed those layers as the afternoon warmth sets in!
